scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace @openstudio/web run dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && cross-env WEB_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 electron ."
scripts.dist: node -e "const p=process.platform; const cmd=p==='win32'?'npm run dist:windows':p==='darwin'?'npm run dist:macos':'npm run dist:linux'; require('node:child_process').execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.pack: node -e "const p=process.platform; const cmd=p==='win32'?'npm run pack:windows':p==='darwin'?'npm run pack:macos':'npm run pack:linux'; require('node:child_process').execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.dist:windows: npm run build && electron-builder --win -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/windows/electron-builder.windows.json --publish never
scripts.dist:macos: npm run build && electron-builder --mac -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/macos/electron-builder.macos.json --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/linux/electron-builder.linux.json --publish never
scripts.dist:windows:publish: npm run build && electron-builder --win -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/windows/electron-builder.windows.json --publish always
scripts.dist:macos:publish: npm run build && electron-builder --mac -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/macos/electron-builder.macos.json --publish always
scripts.dist:linux:publish: npm run build && electron-builder --linux -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/linux/electron-builder.linux.json --publish always
scripts.pack:macos: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/macos/electron-builder.macos.json
scripts.pack:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --dir -c build/common/electron-builder.base.json -c build/linux/electron-builder.linux.json
